title: Architecture Brief Schema
description: Schema for the architecture-brief.json file produced by the architecting skill.

module_name.description: Canonical name of the module or boundary.

mode.description: The mode used to produce this brief.

problem_statement.description: The architectural problem or tension being addressed.

chosen_pattern.description: The architectural pattern selected (e.g., Hexagonal, Vertical Slice).

exports.description: Key functions or classes exported by the module.

dependencies.description: External modules this module is allowed to depend on.

adr_link.description: Link to the corresponding ADR file.
